location.description: Where the error occurred, e.g. 'body.items[3].tags' or 'path.thing-id'

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.
examples: Property foo is required but is missing.

errors.description: Optional list of individual error details

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. This value should not change between occurrences of the error.

type.description: A URI reference to human-readable documentation for the error.

events.description: Event types to deliver. Empty = all events.

headers.description: Custom request headers. Values may use {{variable}} substitution.

payloadTemplate.description: Body template with {{variable}} substitution. Empty = default JSON envelope.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

info.description: Fleet-wide mooring line management. Same API runs onboard (single vessel) and shore (fleet); scope is configuration.
info.title: Mooring Line Management API

post.summary: Ingest an inspection from the third-party API (idempotent by external_id)

get.summary: Chronological inspection logbook for a vessel

post.summary: Upload a certificate, manual or guide for a line
Add a component (tail/lashing) to a line
Log a manual inspection for a line
Move a line to a drum or to storage

get.summary: List condition photos for a line

post.summary: Upload a condition photo for a line
Turn a line to its other side

get.summary: Download a condition report (CSV or PDF)
List a user's API keys (metadata only)

post.summary: Issue an API key (plaintext returned once)

get.summary: Get deck layout (winches, drums, storage with worst-case status)
Vessel dashboard overview (KPIs, condition, attention, trend)

post.summary: Send a test delivery to a webhook
